writers.composer: Søren Rasted & Claus Norreen & René Dif & Lene

lyrics.text: Hi Barbie
lyrics.translation: 肯：嗨，芭比~

lyrics.text: Hi Ken
lyrics.translation: 芭比：嗨，肯

lyrics.text: You wanna go for a ride?
lyrics.translation: 肯：你想去兜风吗？

lyrics.text: Sure Ken.
lyrics.translation: 芭比：非常乐意，肯。

lyrics.text: Jump In...
lyrics.translation: 肯：上来！

lyrics.text: i'm a Barbie girl, in a Barbie world
lyrics.translation: 我是一个在芭比世界里的芭比娃娃

lyrics.text: Life in plastic, it's fantastic.
lyrics.translation: 我的身体是塑料做成的，是人凭想象创作出来的

lyrics.text: You can brush my hair, undress me everywhere.
lyrics.translation: 你可以给我梳头，脱下我的衣服，带我去任何地方

lyrics.text: Imagination, life is your creation.
lyrics.translation: 想象，我的生命就在你的创造力

lyrics.text: Come on Barbie, let's go party!
lyrics.translation: 来吧，芭比，让我们一起去参加派对吧！

lyrics.text: I'm a Barbie girl, in a Barbie world
lyrics.translation: 我是一个在芭比世界里的芭比娃娃

lyrics.text: Life in plastic, it's fantastic.
lyrics.translation: 我的身体是塑料做成的，是人凭想象创作出来的

lyrics.text: You can brush my hair, undress me everywhere.
lyrics.translation: 你可以给我梳头，脱下我的衣服，带我去任何地方

lyrics.text: Imagination, life is your creation.
lyrics.translation: 想象，我的生命就在你的创造力

lyrics.text: I'm a blond bimbo girl, in a fantasy world,
lyrics.translation: 我是一个在虚幻世界里的金发的美丽的女孩

lyrics.text: Dress me up, make it tight, I'm your darling.
lyrics.translation: 给我穿上美丽的紧身的衣服，我就是你的洋娃娃

lyrics.text: You are my doll, rock and roll, feel the glamour in pink,
lyrics.translation: 你是我的洋娃娃，伴随着摇滚的节奏，感受着粉红世界的魅力

lyrics.text: Kiss me here, touch me there, hanky panky.
lyrics.translation: 亲吻我，拥抱着我

lyrics.text: You can touch, you can play, if you say: "I am always yours"
lyrics.translation: 你可以拥抱，你可以和我一起玩耍，如果你说“我永远是你的”的话

lyrics.text: I'm,a Barbie girl, in a Barbie world

lyrics.text: Life in plastic, it's fantastic.

lyrics.text: Come on Barbie, let's go party!
lyrics.translation: 来吧，芭比，让我们一起去参加派对吧！

lyrics.text: Ah, Ah, Ah, yea.
oh,oh,oh,yeah.
Come on Barbie, let's go party!

lyrics.text: uu-oooh.. uu-oooh..
lyrics.translation: 喔~喔~

lyrics.text: Come on Barbie, let's go party!
lyrics.translation: 来吧，芭比，一起去参加派对

lyrics.text: Ah, Ah, Ah, yea.
lyrics.translation: 噢~耶~

lyrics.text: Come on Barbie, let's go party!
lyrics.translation: 来吧，芭比，一起去参加派对

lyrics.text: uu-oooh.. uu-oooh..
lyrics.translation: 喔~喔~

lyrics.text: Make me walk, make me talk, do whatever you please,
lyrics.translation: 让我走路，让我讲话，做任何你感到满意的事情

lyrics.text: I can act like a star, I can beg on my knees.
lyrics.translation: 我可以像明星一样表演，我可以用我的膝盖来求你

lyrics.text: Come jump in, be my friend, let us do it again,
lyrics.translation: 来吧，跳上车，美丽的朋友，让我们再去玩

lyrics.text: hit the town, fool around, let's go party.
lyrics.translation: 去城镇的每个角落疯狂，让我们去参加派对

lyrics.text: You can touch, you can play, if you say: "I'm always yours"
lyrics.translation: 你可以拥抱我，可以和我一起去玩耍，如果你说“我永远是你的”的话

lyrics.text: uu-oooh.. uu-oooh..

lyrics.text: Oh, I'm having so much fun!
lyrics.translation: 芭比：哇哦，我玩的很开心~！

lyrics.text: Well Barbie, we are just getting started.
lyrics.translation: 肯：好吧芭比，这只是快乐的开始~

lyrics.text: Oh I love you Ken
lyrics.translation: 芭比：噢我爱你肯~
